body: [{"ac":1,"text":"Evidence tab appears in runs/[runId] tabbed page alongside Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"Tab lists every file in run's bundle with path + size + mimeType.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"Whitelisted text files \u003c 64KB render inline as raw text.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"Non-whitelisted or \u003e 64KB files show download link only.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"Evidence tab lazy-loads on tab activation (not on page load).","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":6,"text":"test('evidence tab: whitelisted small file inlines', ...) Playwright e2e verifies inline rendering.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":7,"text":"test('evidence tab: large file download-only', ...) Playwright e2e verifies download link for \u003e 64KB.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":8,"text":"test('evidence tab: non-whitelisted extension download-only', ...) Playwright e2e verifies .go / .wasm etc. show download only.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":9,"text":"test('evidence tab: missing path 404', ...) verifies bundleFile(path) returns 404 for out-of-bundle paths.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":10,"text":"p95 dataset (30 evidence files) renders without crash.","kind":"negative","verifiable":true},{"ac":11,"text":"bun run test:e2e green.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true},{"ac":12,"text":"lefthook run pre-commit passes.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true}]

{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"unsafe field \"title\"","fingerprint":"9a9f3e7563c088c6559b50170a909615619d5996d3af04d242043c3656f19c85","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"rewrite_rejected","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.rewrite_rejected","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"The bead is directionally usable, but it still misses several lint requirements: the title is story-style rather than imperative/subsystem-scoped, the AC do not name `Test*` symbols or a `go test -run` filter, the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` gate is absent, and the labels lack `area:*`, `kind:*`, and cross-reference facets. The description, parent/deps, and overall implementation intent are otherwise clear enough to refine rather than split.","score":4,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative subsystem scope, e.g. `frontend: add Evidence tab with whitelist-based inline evidence viewer`.","Add at least one named test in AC, such as a Playwright `test('evidence tab: whitelisted small file inlines', ...)` or a `go test -run` filter.","Add the required package gate to AC, e.g. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/frontend/...`.","Add or adjust labels to include `area:*`, `kind:*`, and any relevant cross-reference labels such as `story:16` or `spec:*`.","Tighten the description with file:line citations for the current-state root cause and proposed fix locations."],"waivers_applied":[]}
